name: Chase Ink Business Preferred® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus points after you spend $8,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

earning_rates.notes: On the first $150,000 spent in combined purchases each account anniversary year.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: Transfer points to leading airline and hotel frequent travel programs at 1:1 ratio.

other_benefits.name: Chase Travel
other_benefits.description: Book travel through Chase Travel for competitive rates and premium benefits.

other_benefits.name: DashPass
other_benefits.description: Complimentary access to DoorDash DashPass (activation required).

sources.notes: Daily Drop review, confirmed current offer of 100K points after $8K spend in 3 months (active since Dec 2025).
TPG overview of Ink card family, confirms $95 AF, 3x on travel/advertising/shipping/cable/phone, primary rental, trip cancellation.
Benefit breakdown confirming $5K trip cancellation, primary rental, purchase protection.
Official Chase page confirms no foreign transaction fees and travel/purchase coverage.
